name: General Business
subject: Cable factory for {company_name}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

{company_name} looks like a good fit for what we do. We're an HDMI-certified cable manufacturer — 18 years, two factories (China + Vietnam), 800K pcs/month.

HDMI, DP, USB, LAN cables — CE/RoHS/UL certified, full testing reports. Most of our clients switched from trading companies and saved 25-35% going direct.

Open to a quick catalog and price list? Just for your reference.
